svg.text: Photo upload flow — offline-first with GPS watermark

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the in-app camera capture work with VisionCamera?')
sendPrompt('How does GPS + timestamp watermarking work?')
sendPrompt('How does the watermark overlay rendering work?')
sendPrompt('How does the offline upload queue work in SQLite?')
sendPrompt('How does R2 upload work from React Native?')
sendPrompt('How does background sync retry work?')
